name: Daily Research Briefing
description: Monitor Reddit communities, check competitors, identify product opportunities, assess sprint progress, flag blocked tasks. Creates daily-signals.json for Mission Control.

name: Midday Operations Check
description: Critical issues check: cash position alerts, low inventory warnings, overdue payables, blocked tasks stuck 3+ days. Updates task board and pushes to Vercel.

name: Daily Team Learning - Batch 1 (Rex, Drake, Blair, Luna)
description: Rex, Drake, Blair, Luna complete daily learning from domain sources. Save logs and upload to Google Drive.

name: Daily Team Learning - Batch 2 (Sage, Nova, Kira, Echo)
description: Sage, Nova, Kira, Echo complete daily learning from domain sources. Save logs and upload to Google Drive.

name: Daily Team Learning - Batch 3 (Xena, Zara, Zoe)
description: Xena, Zara, Zoe complete daily learning from domain sources. Save logs and upload to Google Drive.

name: Mission Control Maintenance
description: Update all Mission Control dashboards with current data, sync social.json from daily signals, commit and deploy to Vercel.

name: Daily GHL Order Sync
description: Pull yesterday's orders from WooCommerce/Shopify into Go High Level. Alert on errors or high volume.

name: Cron Failure Monitor
description: Monitor all cron jobs for failures. Alert on status transitions (ok→error or error→ok). Auto-retry Daily Team Learning batches on failure.

name: Weekly Compliance Sweep
description: Scan elixserpeptides.com for compliance violations against COMPLIANCE.md rules. Research-only framing verification.

name: Weekly Intelligence Brief
description: Compile weekly learning from all team members into strategic intelligence brief. Aggregates all learning logs.

name: Weekly Financial Briefing
description: Analyze cash position, runway, payables, inventory, revenue trends from Google Sheets and Business Data CSV files.

name: Weekly Strategic Memory Review
description: Extract top 5 strategic insights from daily memory files. Prune agent memory files to stay under 6KB. Archive old learnings.
